shell.completeProfileDescription: Stand out and get more work.
shell.paymentsDisclaimer: Payments are arranged directly between customer and worker outside Slashie.

inbox.description: Latest updates on your tasks and bookings.

membership.title: Membership
membership.body: Slashie Unlimited covers platform quoting access. Job payments stay between customer and worker — not through Slashie.

sectionNav.drawerDescription: Jump between your requests, quotes, billing, and account tools.

overview.label: Overview
overview.description: Quick links and headline stats for your account.

requests.label: My Requests
requests.description: Tasks you posted as a customer — quotes, bookings, and completion.

quotes.label: My Quotes
quotes.description: Quotes you sent on other people’s tasks — pending, booked, or done.

earnings.label: Earnings
earnings.description: Historical completed work — reference only, Slashie does not pay out.

billing.label: Billing
billing.description: Slashie Unlimited subscription, quote allowance, and Stripe billing.

profile.label: Profile
profile.description: Customer profile plus worker setup when needed.

shell.completeProfileDescription: 脫穎而出，爭取更多工作。
shell.paymentsDisclaimer: 款項由顧客與工作者在 Slashie 以外直接安排。

inbox.description: 你的任務和預約的最新更新。

membership.title: 會員
membership.body: Slashie Unlimited 涵蓋平台報價權限。工作款項由顧客與工作者直接處理 — 不經 Slashie。

sectionNav.drawerDescription: 在請求、報價、帳單和帳戶工具之間快速切換。

overview.label: 總覽
overview.description: 帳戶快捷連結和重點數據。

requests.label: 我的請求
requests.description: 你以顧客身份發布的任務 — 報價、預約與完成。

quotes.label: 我的報價
quotes.description: 你在他人任務傳送的報價 — 待處理、已預約或已完成。

earnings.label: 收入
earnings.description: 歷史已完成工作 — 僅供參考，Slashie 不會代為發放款項。

billing.label: 帳單
billing.description: Slashie Unlimited 訂閱、報價額度與 Stripe 帳單。

account.label: 帳戶
account.description: 設定、偏好和工作階段控制。

profile.label: 個人檔案
profile.description: 顧客個人檔案，以及需要時的工作者設定。
